title: Kaizen! Pipely goes BAM with Gerhard Lazu
description: Kaizen 18 covers a Fly.io outage affecting Changelog, new features like clickable chapter timestamps in Zulip, the shift to video-first podcast production, and an in-depth exploration of Pipely with guests Matt Johnson and Nabeel Sulieman.
